Event: Magic Training - Bombardier
Event Date: 01/08/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: P13
Bombardier's Trainer Pistols

The unit's attacks have a 36% chance of ignoring 30% of the target's armor.
When attacking, the unit has a 50% chance to take an extra shot at either the enemy with the lowest physical armor or the enemy with the lowest magic armor. If the additional shot is fired at the enemy with the lowest physical armor, the pistol owner tears through that enemy's armor.
When the enemy's armor is torn, that enemy takes 64000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 25% for 2 sec. Also, that enemy takes 96000 physical damage over 3 sec.
If the additional shot is fired at the enemy with the lowest magic armor, the pistol owner casts decay on that enemy's armor. When the enemy's armor is decayed, that enemy takes 64000 pure damage and has their magic armor reduced by 25% for 3 sec. Also, that enemy takes 96000 magic damage over 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
